title: Zeus – a local AI agent orchestrator with web and phone UI (open source)
abstract: Imagine having a personal assistant at your fingertips, always ready to help. That's Zeus – your local AI agent orchestrator. Available on both web and phone UI, Zeus can handle emails, set reminders, and more, making your life easier. Think of it as a whisper in your ear, guiding you through the day. Try it out and see how it transforms your daily routine!
abstract_zh: 你有没有想过，一个小小的AI助手就能帮你搞定一切？Zeus来了！它就像你的私人助理，随时随地守在你身边。不管是家里还是办公室，只需轻轻一点，它就能帮你处理邮件、设定提醒、甚至煮杯咖啡（别急，这一步还没实现）。Zeus就是你的全能小秘书，在你耳边低语，让你的生活更轻松自在。快来试试吧！
